name: MegaMenu
description: MegaMenu is navigation component that displays submenus together.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Height of the viewport, a scrollbar is defined if height of list exceeds this value.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive element.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Identifier of the underlying menu element.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Label property of the menuitem */ label: string | ((...args: any) => string) | undefined; /** * Binding properties of the menuitem */ props: MegaMenuRouterBindProps; /** * Whether or not there is a submenu */ hasSubmenu: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: menubutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current id state as a string */ id: string; /** * Style class of component */ class: string; /** * Toggle event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom menu button template on responsive mode.

slots.name: menubuttonicon
slots.description: Custom menu button icon template on responsive mode.

slots.name: submenuicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether item is active */ active: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: itemicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]
